Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 4, 137 [Namburbu][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[...] ⸢NA⸣ BE ZI.GA ḪULti₃

(o 1) [...] of a man. If an onset of evil [...], [...] not to approach a man and his house.

o 22

[...] ⸢ana⸣ NA u E₂-šu₂ la₃ TEe

o 33

[...] ⸢lu⸣ ina EDIN KI SAR

(o 3) You sweep the ground [...] or in the open country.

o 44

[...] ana IGI dUTU GI.DU₈ GUBan

(o 4) [...] you set up an offering table in front of Šamaš.

o 55

[...] 12-TA.AM₃ ZI₃.KUM

(o 5) You strew 12 [...], isqūqu-flour, [...]. [...] a cake (made) of honey, butter [...]. You fix upright an arrowhead.

o 66

[... DUB]aq NINDA.I₃.DE₂.A LAL₃ I₃.NUN.NA

o 77

[... SAG].⸢DU⸣ GAG.U₄.TAG.GA ta-zaq-qa-ap

o 88

[...] ⸢BAL⸣qi₂ ana ZA₃ KEŠ₂ ina GISSU E₂ IM NIG₂ RI

(o 8) You libate [...]. To the right of the ritual assemblage in the shade of the house ... you strew [...] .... [...] beer (and) oven-parched grain.

o 99

[...] ⸢AḪ?⸣ LU DUBaq KAŠ ŠE.SA.A

o 1010

[...] ⸢GIDIM⸣ ša₂ ina E₂-ia₅ ana ⸢ḪULti₃ ul?⸣ TE

(o 10) The ghost who (is) in my house will not approach evil.

o 1111

[...] x x [...]

(o 11) $ 1 line traces

(rest of obverse missing)
Reverse
rr NaN  (start of reverse missing)
(colophon)
r 1'1'

[...] ⸢TUM₃⸣-šu₂

(r 1') [...] he shall [...] take it (the tablet) away.

r 2'2'

[...] x ma-lik-⸢sa⸣-[an]-⸢dar⸣ LUGAL DUMU ša₂ ma-lik-sa-an-dar

(r 2') [...] ... Alexander, the king, the son of Alexander.
